type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The May 2015 emission calculation was based in part on the mass of wood burned in a beehive burner. A review of site records in September 2015 found that this mass had been over-estimated. Emissions have have been re-calculated based on the verified mass.

comments.comment: The May 2015 emission calculation was based in part on the mass of wood burned in a beehive burner. A review of site records in September 2015 found that this mass had been over-estimated. Emissions have have been re-calculated based on the verified mass. Total VOC reported as Carbon
